name: chart-bar-demo-legend
visual_summary: A bar chart legend component used to display key metrics in a visual format, typically used in reports and dashboards to provide clear labels and descriptions. This component can be used to explain the different data points in a bar chart, making it easier to understand for end-users. It's ideal for developers who need to provide context to their data.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Description: A bar chart legend component used to display key metrics in a visual format, typically used in reports and dashboards to provide clear labels and descriptions. This component can be used to explain the different data points in a bar chart, making it easier to understand for end-users. It's ideal for developers who need to provide context to their data.
Style: modern, flat
Interactions: static
Tags: chart, legend, visualization, reporting, dashboard

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS

- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
